---
title: "growth rate"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)

# basic model settings

m <- 57
hours <- 24

v_min <- 2^(-5)
delta_v <- 0.125
size_index <- 1:m
v_i <- v_min * 2^((size_index - 1) * delta_v)

# true parameter values

gamma_max_true <- 0.20
delta_max_true <- 0.03
E_star_true <- 500
a_true <- 1
b_true <- 2

true_base <- c(
  gamma_max = gamma_max_true,
  delta_max = delta_max_true,
  E_star    = E_star_true,
  a         = a_true,
  b         = b_true
)

# light, growth, and division functions

E_t <- function(t) {
  1000 * max(0, sin(2 * pi * t / 24))
}

gamma_t <- function(t, gamma_max, E_star) {
  gamma_max * (1 - exp(-E_t(t) / E_star))
}

delta_i_t <- function(t, delta_max, a, b) {
  
  if (t < 6) {
    return(rep(0, m))
  }
  
  delta_i <- delta_max * ((a * v_i)^b / (1 + (a * v_i)^b))
  
  return(delta_i)
}

# matrix a

matrix_A <- function(t, gamma_max, delta_max, E_star, a, b) {
  
  A <- matrix(0, nrow = m, ncol = m)
  
  gamma <- gamma_t(t, gamma_max, E_star)
  delta_i <- delta_i_t(t, delta_max, a, b)
  
  j <- as.integer(1 + (1 / delta_v))
  
  for (i in 1:(m - 1)) {
    A[i + 1, i] <- gamma * (1 - delta_i[i])
  }
  
  A[m, m] <- A[m, m] + gamma * (1 - delta_i[m])
  
  for (i in 2:(j - 1)) {
    A[1, i] <- A[1, i] + 2 * delta_i[i]
  }
  
  for (i in j:m) {
    smaller_class <- i + 1 - j
    A[smaller_class, i] <- A[smaller_class, i] + 2 * delta_i[i]
  }
  
  A[1, 1] <- A[1, 1] + ((1 - gamma) * (1 - delta_i[1])) + 2 * delta_i[1]
  
  for (i in 2:(m - 1)) {
    A[i, i] <- A[i, i] + (1 - gamma) * (1 - delta_i[i])
  }
  
  A[m, m] <- A[m, m] + (1 - delta_i[m])
  
  return(A)
}

# matrix b for one hour

matrix_B <- function(t, gamma_max, delta_max, E_star, a, b, dt = 1/6) {
  
  B <- diag(m)
  n_steps <- round(1 / dt)
  
  for (k in 0:(n_steps - 1)) {
    
    time_now <- t + k * dt
    
    A_k <- matrix_A(
      t = time_now,
      gamma_max = gamma_max,
      delta_max = delta_max,
      E_star = E_star,
      a = a,
      b = b
    )
    
    B <- A_k %*% B
  }
  
  return(B)
}

# initial distribution

w0 <- dnorm(size_index, mean = 20, sd = 6)
w0 <- w0 / sum(w0)

# daily mu function

daily_mu <- function(params) {
  
  gamma_max <- params["gamma_max"]
  delta_max <- params["delta_max"]
  E_star <- params["E_star"]
  a <- params["a"]
  b <- params["b"]
  
  u <- w0
  
  for (t in 0:(hours - 1)) {
    
    B_t <- matrix_B(
      t = t,
      gamma_max = gamma_max,
      delta_max = delta_max,
      E_star = E_star,
      a = a,
      b = b
    )
    
    u <- as.numeric(B_t %*% u)
  }
  
  mu <- log(sum(u))
  
  return(as.numeric(mu))
}

# test base mu

mu_base <- daily_mu(true_base)

print("base true mu")
print(mu_base)

# parameter grids

param_ranges <- list(
  gamma_max = seq(0.10, 0.30, length.out = 15),
  delta_max = seq(0.01, 0.08, length.out = 15),
  E_star    = seq(100, 1000, length.out = 15),
  a         = seq(0.5, 4, length.out = 15),
  b         = seq(0.5, 4, length.out = 15)
)

# compute true mu surface for one pair

true_mu_surface <- function(param1, param2) {
  
  surface_results <- data.frame()
  
  for (value1 in param_ranges[[param1]]) {
    
    for (value2 in param_ranges[[param2]]) {
      
      test_params <- true_base
      
      test_params[param1] <- value1
      test_params[param2] <- value2
      
      mu_value <- daily_mu(test_params)
      
      temp <- data.frame(
        Pair = paste(param1, param2, sep = "_vs_"),
        Param1 = param1,
        Param2 = param2,
        Param1Value = value1,
        Param2Value = value2,
        TrueMu = mu_value
      )
      
      surface_results <- rbind(surface_results, temp)
      
      print(
        paste(
          "finished:",
          param1, "=", round(value1, 4),
          ",", param2, "=", round(value2, 4),
          "| true mu =", round(mu_value, 6)
        )
      )
    }
  }
  
  return(surface_results)
}

# compute true mu surfaces for all unique parameter pairs

parameter_names <- names(true_base)

pair_list <- combn(parameter_names, 2, simplify = FALSE)

all_true_mu_results <- data.frame()

for (pair in pair_list) {
  
  param1 <- pair[1]
  param2 <- pair[2]
  
  pair_surface <- true_mu_surface(param1, param2)
  
  all_true_mu_results <- rbind(all_true_mu_results, pair_surface)
}

print(all_true_mu_results)

write.csv(
  all_true_mu_results,
  "true_mu_surface_results.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# plotting function for true mu surfaces

make_true_mu_plot <- function(pair_name) {
  
  plot_data <- subset(all_true_mu_results, Pair == pair_name)
  
  param1_name <- unique(plot_data$Param1)
  param2_name <- unique(plot_data$Param2)
  
  true_x <- true_base[param1_name]
  true_y <- true_base[param2_name]
  
  ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = Param1Value,
      y = Param2Value,
      fill = TrueMu
    )
  ) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    geom_point(
      data = data.frame(x = true_x, y = true_y),
      aes(x = x, y = y),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      shape = 8,
      size = 4,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "cyan", "yellow", "red")) +
    labs(
      title = paste("true mu surface:", param1_name, "vs", param2_name),
      subtitle = "black star = base true parameter pair",
      x = paste("value of", param1_name),
      y = paste("value of", param2_name),
      fill = expression(mu[true])
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# print and save all true mu plots

pair_names <- unique(all_true_mu_results$Pair)

true_mu_plots <- list()

for (pair_name in pair_names) {
  
  p <- make_true_mu_plot(pair_name)
  
  true_mu_plots[[pair_name]] <- p
  
  print(p)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0("true_mu_surface_", pair_name, ".png"),
    plot = p,
    width = 7,
    height = 5
  )
}

# summary table

mu_summary <- all_true_mu_results[
  order(all_true_mu_results$TrueMu),
  c(
    "Pair",
    "Param1Value",
    "Param2Value",
    "TrueMu"
  )
]

print("lowest true mu values")
print(head(mu_summary, 10))

print("highest true mu values")
print(tail(mu_summary, 10))

write.csv(
  mu_summary,
  "true_mu_summary_sorted.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
